# Humation

Humation is a hand-drawn deterministic avatar engine for apps. It renders local
SVG assets from a seed or explicit selections. No AI generation and no Humation
API call is required for rendering.

Primary docs:
- https://humation.app/docs
- https://github.com/humation-labs/humation

Packages:
- `@humation/react`: React `<Avatar>` component.
- `@humation/assets-humation-1`: Humation 1 manifest and embedded SVG assets.
- `@humation/core`: Framework-independent renderer and UI helpers.
- `@humation/web-component`: `<humation-avatar>` custom element.

Designed avatar builder UI:
- Install with `npx shadcn@latest add humation-labs/humation/avatar-builder`.
- Import `AvatarBuilder` from `@/components/humation/avatar-builder`.
- Use this block as the starting point for avatar creation UI instead of
  inventing a simplified picker.

Agent skill:
- Install with `npx skills add humation-labs/humation --skill humation-avatar`.

React quick start:

```tsx
import { Avatar } from '@humation/react';
import { humation1 } from '@humation/assets-humation-1';

<Avatar assets={humation1} seed={user.id} size={96} />
```

Core SVG rendering:

```ts
import { createAvatar } from '@humation/core';
import { humation1 } from '@humation/assets-humation-1';

const svg = createAvatar(humation1, { seed: 'felix' }).toString();
```

Implementation guidance for coding agents:
- Use `@humation/react` for React UI.
- Use `@humation/assets-humation-1` for the official asset set.
- Use `@humation/core` when raw SVG output or picker previews are needed.
- Use `@humation/web-component` outside React.
- Use the shadcn `avatar-builder` block for polished avatar creation UI.
- Do not call a Humation API for avatar rendering.
- Use `seed` for deterministic generated avatars.
- Use `selections` and `colors` for user-customized avatars.
- Part selections accept names, aliases, and canonical IDs.
- Common selection slots: `head`, `body`, `bottom`, `item`, `glasses`.
- Common color slots: `hair`, `clothes`, `bottom`, `skin`, `stroke`, `background`.
